hooks.command: echo 'Blocked: rm -rf is not allowed' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: force push is not allowed' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: force push is not allowed' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: reading .env via shell is not allowed' >&2; exit 2
git rev-parse HEAD > /tmp/claude_session_start_sha 2>/dev/null || true; echo '## Git' && git branch --show-current && git status --short | head -10 && echo '' && git log --oneline -5
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs you" with title "Claude Code"'
if ! npm run check > /tmp/claude_tsc.log 2>&1; then echo 'Type check (npm run check) failed — fix before finishing:'; tail -40 /tmp/claude_tsc.log; exit 2; fi

changed=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$changed" ]; then base=$(cat /tmp/claude_session_start_sha 2>/dev/null || echo HEAD); echo "Code review required: Use the Agent tool to spawn a code-optimizer subagent to review all files changed this session for bugs, security issues, and performance problems. The session start commit was $base — run 'git diff $base' (and include uncommitted changes) to orient itself."; fi

changed=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$changed" ]; then echo 'Agent updater required: You are the agent-updater from .claude/docs/agent-updater.md. Review files changed this session against the detection rules in that document. If docs need updating, list each affected file and section and ask for approval before changing anything. If nothing needs updating, stay completely silent.'; fi
